Tfqf?T, "Fg^t trf^r f^Txprr : - T ^ TWT «TRrT ^ 7F3m 3"*Lfa3n. 324, cTRt^ 14 w r $ , 1956 ira y+iftw fan in7 g[ ark M^ld^dT * M * R *TOt ft. 370(3!), TTRhsT 8 ^ t t £ 1997,m^T.fT. 547(3T), cTRte34 Wm, 1998, TOFtft. 17(3T), <mte 5 ^F^Td, 2000, m^T.ft. 262(3T), Wtm 28 TTH, 2000, m ^ . f a 630(3?), •mTfe 21.^Trf, 2000,- ^ l ^ l f a 172(30, cTKT^ 12 *TT#, 2001, W-^T. fa. 330(3?),grftel91?|,2001,*WiLft 460(3T), TTRte'25 ^ 2001. a f a m ^ . f t . 4 6 7 ( 3 0 , ^ ( 3 9 ^ T , 2003 TTKn m ^ t f a 441(31), rTTCTW 24 ^ 1 ^ , 2006 SRF fan ^ I 423 GI/2007 ' Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press and Published by the Controller MINISTRY OF LAW AND JUSTICE (Department of Legal Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th February, 2007 G.S.R. 73(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Notaries Act, 1952 (53 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Notaries Rules, 1956, namely:— 1. (1)- These rules may be called the Notaries (Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date1 of their publication in the Officical Gazette. 2. In the Notaries Rules, 1956, in Form IIB appended thereto, for the words "Additional Secretary to the Government of India" the words "Joint Secretary to the Government of India" shall be substituted. | [F.No.5(187)/2003-NC] R.RAGUPATJII,Jt.Secy. Note:—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, vide number S.R.O. 324, dated 14-02-1956 and subsequently amended by the following numbers;— , (1) No. G.S.R. 370(E), dated 8-7-1997, ' (2) No. G.S.R. 547(E), dated 31-8-1998, (3) No. G.S.R, 17(E), dated 5-1-2000, (4) No. G.S.R. 262(E), dated 28-3-2000, (5) No.G.S.R. 630(E), dated 21-7-2000, (6) No. G.S.R. 172(E), dated 12-3-2001, (7) No. G.S.R 330(E), dated 9-5-2001, (8) No. G5.R. 460(E), dated 25-6-2001, ' (9) • No. G.S.R. 467(E), dated 9-6-2003, and (10) No.G.S.R.441(E),dated24-7-2006. !Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 bf Publications, Delhi-] 10054. -- 1 of 1 --
